figures.caption: Fig. 4: Convergence rates of EM, MU-SBL (p = 1) and pSBL (p = {0.25, 0.5, 0.75}) update rules as a function of the number of non-zero elements (N=30, M=120, SNR=40 dB).
Fig. 8: Performance of our proposed neural network architecture on different types of measurement matrices.

Fig. 7: Evolution of the weights as a function of iterations. We showcase the results for different number of iterations as well as the different types of update rule generation for the array matrix (N = 30,M = 120, SNR=40 dB).
Fig. 6: Performance curves of EM, MU-SBL (p = 1) and pSBL (p = {0.25, 0.5, 0.75}) update rules as a function of the number of non-zero elements for the random matrix(N=30, M=120, SNR=40 dB).
